title: Fix develop-v5 extended tests DEPRECATED failure
body:
@gezalore 

Running the extended tests on develop-v5 branch, and updating that branch's verilator submodule to develop-v5 HEAD fails.

```
%Warning-DEPRECATED: /svaha/wsnyder/SandBox/homecvs/v4/verilator_ext_tests/t/../submodules/Cores-SweRV-EH2/design/lib/beh_lib.$
 1223 |    logic  en_ff /*verilator clock_enable*/ ;
      |                 ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```

I think we had agreed that this would be ignored and not deprecated for backward compatibility. Note the code in question it outside our control, and still needs to work with V4, so is a good example of why ignoring this is a arguably better experience.

When fixed, please consider pushing the submodule update.
